title: Potential Path Traversal Vulnerability
description: The command allows user-specified paths for ingestion without validation, which could lead to path traversal attacks.

root_cause_potential: Missing path validation in user input processing
No sanitization of file paths before ingestion
Security vulnerability allowing access to unintended files
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Validate and sanitize input paths to ensure they do not escape the intended directory structure

immediate_fixes.action: Implement path validation to prevent directory traversal
Add input sanitization for all user-provided paths
Define and enforce allowed base directories
immediate_fixes.rationale: Restrict file operations to designated areas only

impact_assessment.user_impact: Medium - Security risk but requires specific attack vectors
impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Medium - Security vulnerability that needs addressing
impact_assessment.urgency: Medium - Should be resolved to maintain security posture
